variables.description: Exclusion Criteria. Q9. Prior history of malignancy other than MDS (except basal cell or squamous cell carcinoma or carcinoma in situ of the cervix or breast) unless the subject has been free of disease for  more or equal to 3 years

variables.description: Exclusion Criteria. Q1. Serous medical illness which would limit survival to  less than 2 years

variables.description: Exclusion Criteria. Q7. Lab abnormalities. Serum total bilirubin  more than 20 mg/dL  (34 umol/L)

variables.name: SerumCreatinine
variables.description: Exclusion Criteria. Q7. Lab abnormalities. Serum creatinine more than 2.0 mg/dL or greater than 2x greater than institutional upper limits of normal (ULN)

variables.name: SerumSGOT
variables.description: Exclusion Criteria. Q7. Lab abnormalities. Serum SGOTAST or SGPTALT more than  2.5x ULN (Upper Limits of Normal)

variables.name: UncontrolledConcurrentIllness
variables.description: Exclusion Criteria. Q12.
